key_insights.insight: Luck is often the result of strategic action and hard work put in increasing the probability of success.
key_insights.quote: Action and smart strategic work is just increasing probability that you know you might get what people call luck.

key_insights.insight: Having clear goals is essential to navigate life like a game of chess, adapting tactics when needed.
key_insights.quote: Life is like a game of chess and you're moving pieces to get to that checkmate,to where you want to be. And often it diverts and you have to have different tactics but you you have to have the ambition to know the exact point to where you want to be.

key_insights.insight: Embracing individuality and not conforming to the norm can lead to unique opportunities and success.
key_insights.quote: I didn't fit in particularly well.And I wasn't going to change my way of fitting into everyone else.

key_insights.insight: It's important to be aware of your limitations and push them to see what you can achieve and learn.
key_insights.quote: I think I know my limitations maybe and when I but I also like pushing those limitations to see where I can get to and seeing what I can achieve and learn.

key_insights.insight: Comfortable and confident clothing can influence people's performance and well-being.
key_insights.quote: If we put students in comfortable, confident clothing,they're confident, that's comfortable and soft,their results are better than other people who are in uncomfortable clothing and they don't feel as confident.

key_insights.insight: It is important to understand that not fitting a certain creative vision in casting is not a personal attack, just a matter of business.
key_insights.quote: You have to realize that when you were casting is they weren't it wasn't personal it was almost business no you just don't fit the creative that we want at the moment.

actionable_advice.advice: Observe and learn from those successful in your field.
actionable_advice.how_to: Identify top performers and actively observe their strategies, ask questions, and adapt their successful approaches to your own work.

actionable_advice.advice: Embrace risk to find reward and challenge yourself.
actionable_advice.how_to: Incorporate a slight risk in everything you do to determine what is worthwhile doing, while recognizing failure as an opportunity to learn.

actionable_advice.advice: Be a conscious listener when others share their feelings.
actionable_advice.how_to: Practice active listening, be patient and help people find expert professional help when needed, as it can significantly impact someone's well-being.

memorable_stories: David's anecdote about turning up at New York casting calls at different times to avoid the 'pack mentality' and gain an advantage.
David's story about quitting high-paying commercial modeling work to focus on more prestigious editorial work to achieve a partnership with Dolce & Gabbana.
The experience of seeing people diagnosed with bipolar and witnessing the 'dark side of it', is how he learned to be patient with them.
contrarian_claims: Luck is more about strategy and hard work than chance.
Being happy with achievement only lasts a short while; the journey is more important.
The discomfort of the red carpet is a common reaction and shows that being visually 'out there' does not equate to confidence.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - David Gandy: Highest Paid Male Model Opens Up About Insecurities & Imposter Syndrome
